+# Independent settings for the local costmap
+local_costmap:
+  map_type: costmap
+
+  global_frame    : odom
+  robot_base_frame: base_footprint
+  transform_tolerance: 0.2
+
+  update_frequency : 5.0
+  publish_frequency: 2.0
+
+  static_map    : false
+  rolling_window: true
+  width         : 5.0
+  height        : 5.0
+  # @todo try to reduce the resolution and check if it helps in narrow spaces
+  resolution    : 0.05
+
+  robot_radius: 0.25
+
+  plugins:
+    - name: obstacle_laser_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_sonar_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_ir_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_bumper_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_vo_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: obstacle_rgbd_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::ObstacleLayer'
+    - name: footprint_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::FootprintLayer'
+    - name: inflation_layer
+      type: 'costmap_2d::InflationLayer'
+
+  obstacle_laser_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: base_scan
+    combination_method: 1 # @todo review why here for the local costmap we use '1' for all layers
+
+    base_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_laser_link
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: scan
+      expected_update_rate: 0.3
+      observation_persistence: 1.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 3.0
+      obstacle_range: 2.5
+      min_obstacle_height: -0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 0.2
+
+  obstacle_sonar_layer:
+    enabled: false
+    observation_sources: sonar_cloud sonar_max_range_cloud
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    sonar_cloud:
+      sensor_frame: base_link
+      data_type: PointCloud2
+      topic: sonar_cloud
+      expected_update_rate: 1.0
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 3.0
+      obstacle_range: 2.5
+      min_obstacle_height: 0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 1.8
+
+    sonar_max_range_cloud:
+      sensor_frame: base_link
+      data_type: PointCloud2
+      topic: sonar_max_range_cloud
+      expected_update_rate: 1.0
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      marking: false
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 4.5
+      obstacle_range: 3.0
+      min_obstacle_height: 0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 1.8
+
+  obstacle_ir_layer:
+    enabled: false
+    observation_sources: ir_cloud
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    ir_cloud:
+      sensor_frame: base_link
+      data_type: PointCloud2
+      topic: ir_cloud
+      expected_update_rate: 1.0
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 2.0
+      obstacle_range: 1.7
+      min_obstacle_height: 0.2
+      max_obstacle_height: 1.8
+
+  obstacle_bumper_layer:
+    enabled: false
+    observation_sources: bumper_cloud
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    bumper_cloud:
+      sensor_frame: base_link
+      data_type: PointCloud2
+      topic: bumper_cloud
+      expected_update_rate: 1.0
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 1.0
+      obstacle_range: 0.2
+      min_obstacle_height: 0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 0.3
+
+  obstacle_vo_layer:
+    enabled: true
+    observation_sources: vo_cloud
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    vo_cloud:
+      sensor_frame: map
+      data_type: PointCloud
+      topic: vo_cloud
+      expected_update_rate: 12.0
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      marking: true
+      clearing: false
+      raytrace_range: 1.0
+      obstacle_range: 100.0
+      min_obstacle_height: 0.0
+      max_obstacle_height: 2.0
+
+  obstacle_rgbd_layer:
+    enabled: false
+    observation_sources: rgbd_scan
+    combination_method: 1
+
+    rgbd_scan:
+      sensor_frame: base_footprint
+      data_type: LaserScan
+      topic: rgbd_scan
+      expected_update_rate: 0.5
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 2.5
+      obstacle_range: 2.2
+      blanking_range: 0.5
+      min_obstacle_height: -0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 0.2
+
+    rgbd_cloud:
+      sensor_frame: base_footprint
+      data_type: PointCloud2
+      topic: floor_filter_xtion/filtered_cloud
+      expected_update_rate: 1.0
+      observation_persistence: 0.0
+      inf_is_valid: true
+      marking: true
+      clearing: true
+      raytrace_range: 5.5
+      obstacle_range: 5.0
+      min_obstacle_height: -0.1
+      max_obstacle_height: 0.2
+
+  footprint_layer:
+    enabled: true
+
+  inflation_layer:
+    enabled            : true
+    inflation_radius   : 0.3
+    cost_scaling_factor: 2.0

+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.4.6)
+include($ENV{ROS_ROOT}/core/rosbuild/rosbuild.cmake)
+
+# Append to CPACK_SOURCE_IGNORE_FILES a semicolon-separated list of
+# directories (or patterns, but directories should suffice) that should
+# be excluded from the distro.  This is not the place to put things that
+# should be ignored everywhere, like "build" directories; that happens in
+# rosbuild/rosbuild.cmake.  Here should be listed packages that aren't
+# ready for inclusion in a distro.
+#
+# This list is combined with the list in rosbuild/rosbuild.cmake.  Note
+# that CMake 2.6 may be required to ensure that the two lists are combined
+# properly.  CMake 2.4 seems to have unpredictable scoping rules for such
+# variables.
+#list(APPEND CPACK_SOURCE_IGNORE_FILES /core/experimental)
+
+rosbuild_make_distribution(0.1.0)

+include $(shell rospack find mk)/cmake_stack.mk
\ No newline at end of file

+transform_tolerance: 0.2
+obstacle_range: 2.0
+raytrace_range: 2.5
+#robot_radius: ir_of_robot
+inflation_radius: 0.55 
+
+#observation_sources: base_scan_shadow_filtered base_scan 
+observation_sources:  base_scan  cloud_laser_up cloud_laser_up_holes #virtualObstacles
+
+#base_scan_shadow_filtered: {sensor_frame: base_laser_link, data_type: PointCloud, expected_update_rate: 0.2,
+#  observation_persistence: 0.0, marking: true, clearing: false, min_obstacle_height: -0.08, max_obstalce_height: 2.0}
+
+base_scan: {sensor_frame: base_laser_link, data_type: LaserScan, topic: /base_scan_throttle , expected_update_rate: 0.3,
+  observation_persistence: 0.0, marking: true, clearing: true, min_obstacle_height: -0.08, max_obstalce_height: 2.0}
+
+cloud_laser_up: {sensor_frame: base_link, data_type: PointCloud, topic: /hokuyo/cloud, expected_update_rate: 0.2,
+  observation_persistence: 0.0, marking: true, clearing: true, min_obstacle_height: 0.05, max_obstalce_height: 0.70}
+
+cloud_laser_up_holes: {sensor_frame: base_link, data_type: PointCloud, topic: /hokuyo/cloud, expected_update_rate: 0.2,
+  observation_persistence: 0.0, marking: true, clearing: true, min_obstacle_height: -1.0, max_obstalce_height: -0.05}
+
+virtualObstacles: {sensor_frame: map, data_type: PointCloud, topic: /virtual_obstacles , expected_update_rate: 2.0,
+  observation_persistence: 2.0, marking: true, clearing: false, min_obstacle_height: 0.0, max_obstalce_height: 2.0}

+<!-- 
+
+This launch file shows how to start a hokuyo node. 
+
+You may have to change the port parameter if your laser is not at
+/dev/ttyACM0.
+
+You can use rostopic to see the data:
+rostopic echo /scan
+
+-->
+
+<launch>
+  <node name="hokuyo" pkg="hokuyo_node" type="hokuyo_node" respawn="false">
+  
+    <!-- Starts up faster, but timestamps will be inaccurate. --> 
+    <param name="calibrate_time" type="bool" value="true"/> 
+    
+    <!-- Set the port to connect to here -->
+    <param name="port" type="string" value="/dev/ttyACM0"/> 
+
+    <param name="frame_id" type="string" value="/base_torso_laser_link"/>
+
+    <param name="intensity" type="bool" value="false"/>
+
+    <remap from="/scan" to="/hokuyo/LAS_01"/>
+  </node>
+    
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+<launch>
+<node pkg="laser_filters" type="scan_to_cloud_filter_chain" output="screen" name="hokuyo_laser_filter">
+      <remap from="scan" to="hokuyo/LAS_01" />
+      <remap from="cloud_filtered" to="hokuyo/cloud" />
+      <rosparam command="load" file="$(find reem_laser_sensors)/config/upper_laser_filter.yaml" />
+</node>
+</launch>
